heading: Punishment of violations of regulations
label: 552d Punishment of violations of regulations
text: Any violation of the regulations issued under sections 552a to 552d of this title shall be punished as is provided in .section 1853 of title 18
notes: Codification“” substituted in text for “” on authority of , , the first section of which enacted Title 18, Crimes and Criminal Procedure.Section 1853 of title 18section 104 of title 18act June 25, 1948, ch. 64562 Stat. 683
